record.name: EUR-Lex + CELLAR
record.coverage: All EU law — treaties, regulations, directives, decisions, international agreements, consolidated acts, CJEU case law, Official Journal (L + C), COM/JOIN preparatory acts; back to 1951 (ECSC); 24 languages
record.access: SPARQL at publications.europa.eu/webapi/rdf/sparql; Cellar REST at publications.europa.eu/resource/cellar/{uuid}; legacy SOAP webservice; bulk 'Data Dump' on op.europa.eu; ELI/CELEX/ECLI URIs; `eurlex` R package and `eu_corpus_compiler` Python wrappers
record.source_format: Formex XML (native OJ), Akoma Ntoso XML, XHTML, PDF/A, RDF/XML metadata
record.license_note: Commission Decision 2011/833/EU on reuse. Default (2019 decision): CC BY 4.0 for editorial/summaries, CC0 1.0 for raw data/metadata. OJ texts themselves effectively public domain (Berne art. 2(4)).

raw.license: Open Government Licence v3.0 (Crown copyright) — commercial + derivative reuse allowed with attribution

record.name: Find Case Law (The National Archives)
record.coverage: Judgments from E&W courts + UK-wide UKSC + Privy Council (since 2009 for UKSC); launched April 2022; excludes Scotland, NI, Ireland
record.access: Public REST API + Atom feed; docs at nationalarchives.github.io/ds-find-caselaw-docs/public
record.license_note: Open Justice Licence. CRITICAL: computational analysis (i.e., RAG ingestion) requires a separate free licence — apply to caselawlicence@nationalarchives.gov.uk. 'External indexing of documents' not permitted under default licence.

record.name: BAILII

record.access: HTML only; robots.txt DISALLOWS crawlers; ToS explicitly prohibit bulk download and external indexing
record.license_note: Mixed — underlying content Crown/Irish/EU copyright; BAILII HTML enrichment is BAILII's copyright. SCRAPING-RISKY — do not bulk-ingest.

record.name: CourtListener (Free Law Project)
record.coverage: ~200 federal + state courts; SCOTUS 1754–present; oral-argument audio; judge database; RECAP PACER archive (hundreds of millions of docket/document objects)
record.access: REST API v4 (token, free); bulk S3 (s3://com-courtlistener-storage/bulk-data/ --no-sign-request); 2TB public embeddings bucket; webhooks
record.license_note: Site content CC BY-ND 4.0; underlying opinions/PACER docs are public domain (government edicts). Respect 'blocked' flag in redistribution.

record.name: PACER
record.coverage: All US federal district/bankruptcy/appellate dockets (>1B documents)
record.access: Per-court CM/ECF; RSS for recent entries; NO bulk download; automated bulk harvesting forbidden by ToS
record.license_note: Documents PD but access metered ($0.10/page, $3.00 cap, quarterly $30 waiver). Prefer RECAP.

record.source_format: JSON, XML, text; Parquet on HF
record.license_note: CC0 1.0 (fully open since March 2024 when Ravel/LexisNexis embargo lifted)
